leadText: A Bug Tera Shard (Japanese: テラピースむし Tera Piece Bug) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX. It is a type of Tera Shard, which can be used to change the Tera Type of a Pokémon. It corresponds to the Bug type.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] 50 Bug Tera Shards can be used to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Bug at the Treasure Eatery in Medali , except for Ogerpon and Terapagos .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Area Zero , North Province (Area One) Academy Ace Tournament Tera Raid Battles (3★ onwards) S V TM Ogre Oustin' S V ID Area Zero Underdepths , Canyon Biome , Coastal Biome , Polar Biome , Savanna Biome Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Pokémon Stamp Rally 2024 Tera Shards All July 12 to October 31, 2024 PJCS 2025 Participation Tera Shards All June 21 to September 30, 2025 Shiny Treasures of Ruin Tera Shards All August 8 to September 30, 2025

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ZA On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokémon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.
